metadata.title: About Us
metadata.description: Learn about Net eSIM and our mission to make global connectivity simple and affordable for every traveler.
metadata.keywords: about net esim, global esim, esim travel, digital sim, futurex

hero.title: Global connectivity, simplified.
hero.subtitle: We believe staying connected shouldn't be complicated. Net eSIM gives you instant, affordable data wherever you go.
hero.feature_body: Net Sim is a digital connectivity platform providing mobile data services using modern eSIM technology. Users will be able to activate mobile data plans worldwide without using physical SIM cards.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: At Net eSIM, we're on a mission to eliminate roaming fees and make global connectivity accessible to everyone. We partner with leading telecom operators worldwide to bring you reliable data at fair prices — delivered digitally, instantly.
mission.heading: Make global connectivity effortless
mission.body_simple: To give every traveler access to reliable internet through a service that is genuinely simple, transparent in pricing, and built around how people actually travel today.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: A world where every traveler can stay connected without thinking about it. No SIM swapping, no bill shock, no coverage anxiety. Just seamless, affordable data wherever you go.
vision.heading: A world where the physical SIM is history
vision.body_simple: A future where every traveler arrives at their destination already connected — where a data plan is as effortless to arrange as a boarding pass, and just as reliable.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Clear pricing with no hidden fees. What you see is what you pay.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: Dual network coverage across 190+ countries ensures you're always connected.

items.title: Simplicity
items.description: From purchase to activation in under 2 minutes. No paperwork, no hassle.

items.title: Support
items.description: 24/7 multilingual support whenever you need help on your journey.

story.title: Our Story
story.heading: How We Started
story.body: Net eSIM was born from a simple frustration: why is staying connected while traveling so expensive and complicated? Founded by a team of telecom and travel enthusiasts, we set out to build the easiest way to get mobile data abroad. Today, we serve travelers from over 190 countries.
story.featured_heading: Born from a frustration every traveler knows
story.featured_body: Net Sim is a digital connectivity platform developed and operated by NET NOVA GROUP LTD in London, United Kingdom. Our mission is to simplify global connectivity by allowing users to install and activate mobile data plans digitally using eSIM technology.
story.airport_text: It starts at the airport. You land, tired from a long flight, and face the same ritual: find the SIM kiosk, fill in forms, wait — then hope the coverage actually includes your route.
story.conviction_text: Net Sim was built on one conviction: your connection should be ready before your bag is packed. No queues, no physical SIM, no surprise charges.
story.unacceptable_text: We found it unacceptable that millions of travelers go through this every single day. The infrastructure to do better already existed. What was missing was the will to build it properly.

video.title: Watch Our Story
video.heading: Meet Net eSIM
video.body: See how Net eSIM is changing the way travelers stay connected around the world.
video.additionalBody: From a small startup to a trusted travel companion, our journey has always been about making connectivity simple, affordable, and accessible for everyone.
video.fact: Net eSIM has connected over 2 million travelers across 190+ countries, saving them an average of $40 per trip in roaming fees.
